description: Lock the 2026-06-24 rescope of sfumato_chiaroscuro_techniques to Leonardo-era painting techniques for smoky transitions and light-dark modelling.

checks.reason: The node is now anchored to Leonardo's late-15th-century chiaroscuro and sfumato practice, not to Vesalius 1543 or Caravaggio's seventeenth-century dramatic use.
Perspective is adjacent Renaissance visual practice, not a direct prerequisite for the scoped tonal and smoky edge-transition techniques.
The 1543 anatomy node is later than the corrected Leonardo-era painting-technique anchor.
Oil painting is the material painting technique source-linked to Leonardo's light-dark and sfumato effects.
